# Pinned package versions for reproducibility.
#
# NB: MACE and SevenNet require slightly different e3nn versions
# (MACE wants e3nn==0.4.4; SevenNet wants e3nn>=0.5.0). Run them in
# separate venvs OR install MACE first (e3nn==0.4.4), then SevenNet
# (which will upgrade e3nn to 0.6+, breaking MACE temporarily).
#
# ORB v3 (orb-models 0.5.5) pulls torch 2.11+CUDA 13 which conflicts
# with mace-torch 0.3.15's torch 2.5+CUDA 12 baseline. Either separate
# venvs, or set LD_LIBRARY_PATH to nvidia/cu13/lib for ORB and accept
# pip dependency-resolver warnings.

# Core scientific stack
numpy>=2.0
scipy>=1.10
ase==3.28.0
pymatgen>=2025.0
wulffpack==1.5
matplotlib>=3.10

# PyTorch (CUDA 12.4)
torch==2.5.1

# MACE (use e3nn 0.4.4 for compatibility with MACE 0.3.15)
mace-torch==0.3.15
e3nn==0.4.4

# SevenNet (use e3nn >=0.5.0; install in separate venv if MACE coexists)
sevenn==0.12.1

# ORB v3 (pulls torch 2.11+CUDA 13; install in separate venv if MACE coexists)
orb-models==0.5.5
